back_translation: A song of ascents. Blessed are all who fear the LORD, who walk in His ways.
When you eat the fruit of the labor of your hands, you will be happy, and it will be well with you.
Your wife will be like a fruitful vine within your house; your sons will be like olive shoots around your table.
Behold, thus shall the man who fears the LORD be blessed.
May the LORD bless you from Zion; may you see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life,
and may you see your children's children. Peace be upon Israel.
